title: codereview-P3: parse_impl_logs still materializes full log to list[str] defeating streaming intent
description: scripts/analyze-hetero-fleet.py:107 lines = list(f) loads entire (potentially multi-GB) log into memory before parse_telemetry or legacy. The memory bead project-LICHEN-ix7m and parse_telemetry docstring emphasize streaming. Use a generator or process in single pass without full materialization. tagged codereview
close_reason: Fixed via streaming refactor and centralized TX/RX case handling in parse_impl_logs. All P4/P3 addressed as real work.
